title: erigeron acris subsp. manshuricus
intro: Erigeron acris subsp. manshuricus, also known as the Amur fleabane or Manshuriian daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic agent, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Erigeron acris subsp. manshuricus include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory problems, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and skin issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
